case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 150-180s emailservice metrics. Latency.p50/p90 dev=+1.6 confirms emailservice latency anomaly. Traces show lower latency (dev=-0.2) but call.count dev=-0.2 suggests reduced load. Root cause remains emailservice latency.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 150-180s checkoutservice metrics. Latency.p50 dev=-2.0 and latency.p90 dev=-0.8 show improved performance, while workload dev=+1.3 indicates increased load. Traces show reduced checkoutservice>emailservice latency (dev=-0.2) but emailservice's own latency anomalies persist. Root cause remains emailservice latency.
Emailservice latency anomalies persist despite reduced checkoutservice>emailservice latency. Workload increase on checkoutservice correlates with overall system stress.
